name: @quanta-intellect/vessel-browser
description: AI-native web browser runtime for autonomous agents with human supervision

scripts.dist: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --linux --publish never
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --linux dir --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:icon:mac && npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:dir: npm run build:icon:mac && npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dir --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:signed: npm run build:icon:mac && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:dir:signed: npm run build:icon:mac && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dir --publish never
scripts.check:cleanup: npm run typecheck && git diff --check && node scripts/check-cleanup.mjs && npm run deadcode:check

author: Quanta Intellect <hello@quantaintellect.com>
